name: ETH Historical Backfill Dataset
edge_rationale: ETH strategy transfer research requires a complete, audited ETHUSDT historical dataset comparable to the BTC research snapshot. This milestone materializes that dataset with resumable daily checkpoints and quality gates.
counterparty_or_market_mechanism: No trading edge is tested. The milestone validates whether ETHUSDT 2022-2026 market data can be built as a deterministic research snapshot without contaminating runtime storage.
required_data: ETHUSDT metrics daily ZIPs for open interest
ETHUSDT aggTrades daily ZIPs aggregated to 60s and 15m buckets
frozen_assumptions: No production, PAPER, LIVE, runtime, core, execution, orchestrator, or settings changes.
Output must be a separate SQLite database under research_lab/snapshots.
Daily checkpoints must make the job resumable.
Raw ZIP/CSV archives are not persisted.
Disk guard must remain active before each day is processed.
ETH strategy transfer backtest is out of scope until this dataset is complete and audited.
expected_observation: A successful run creates a complete ETHUSDT 2022-2026 research snapshot with explicit daily checkpoints, low missing rates, zero duplicate groups, zero OHLC errors, and no failed days.

kill_criteria.runtime_db_path: Any write to storage/btc_bot.db or runtime storage invalidates the milestone.
kill_criteria.disk_guard_triggered: If disk guard blocks, stop and report partial progress rather than continue.
kill_criteria.raw_archive_persistence: Persisting raw ZIP/CSV archives invalidates the dataset milestone.
kill_criteria.unresolved_failed_days: Any failed day must be resolved before dataset can be audit-ready.
kill_criteria.strategy_claim: Any ETH strategy result or runtime approval claim is out of scope.

failure_modes: Historical archive schema changes on older days.
Funding REST historical pagination or availability differs from daily archive data.
A few high-volume days create temporary memory pressure during aggTrades aggregation.
Partial run is mistaken for complete dataset.
Quality report uses expected counts for the wrong date window.
out_of_scope: Keeping raw ZIP or CSV archives.
author: Codex
